MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Ora Prochovnick; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Anissa Conley, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Essex Property Trust, Inc.
Attorney, Alan Horwitz representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Bettie L. Monte, aka Betty Monte, aka Betty Montes, is present.
Attorney, Richard J. McPalmer representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle, the trial date of AUG-24-2009 remains set.
